title: M.Sc. Informatics
requirements_summary: Recognized bachelor in computer science or related field, proof of English (IELTS/TOEFL), and an aptitude assessment.

title: M.Sc. Mechanical Engineering
requirements_summary: Bachelor in mechanical engineering, English proficiency, and curricular analysis for eligibility.

requirements_summary: University entrance qualification, German proficiency (DSH/TestDaF), and possible VPD via uni-assist.

requirements_summary: Bachelor with quantitative background, statistics and programming coursework, and English proficiency.

requirements_summary: Bachelor in mechanical engineering, German proficiency, and application via uni-assist.

title: M.Sc. Computer Science

deadlines.deadline_note: Official summer application period is 1 November to 15 December; shown for summer semester 2027.
Official winter deadline is 31 May for direct and uni-assist applications; shown for winter semester 2027.

requirements_summary: Bachelor in computer science or a related discipline with at least 110 ECTS in computer science, qualifying grade/ranking, thesis or research-paper abstract, and English or German language proof. A1 German is required by the end of the first year if studying only in English.
source_note: Official page states no tuition fees and lists direct/uni-assist winter windows plus the summer window.

title: M.Sc. Data and Knowledge Engineering

deadlines.deadline_note: International bachelor's degree applicants apply via uni-assist by 15 November; shown for summer semester 2027.
International bachelor's degree applicants apply via uni-assist by 15 May; shown for winter semester 2027.

requirements_summary: Bachelor in computer science, data science, statistics, or a related field with required CS/statistics coursework, minimum German-scale grade of 2.30, and German or English at C1.
source_note: Official page separates deadlines for German bachelor's applicants and international bachelor's applicants; catalog uses the international/uni-assist dates relevant to Indian applicants.

title: M.Sc. Digital Engineering

deadlines.deadline_note: International bachelor's degree applicants apply via uni-assist by 15 November; shown for summer semester 2027.
International bachelor's degree applicants apply via uni-assist by 15 May; shown for winter semester 2027.

requirements_summary: Bachelor in digital engineering, engineering, computer science, or a related field with a minimum German-scale grade of 2.50 and German or English at C1. The program can be completed in English.
source_note: Official page separates deadlines for German bachelor's applicants and international bachelor's applicants; catalog uses the international/uni-assist dates relevant to Indian applicants.

title: M.Sc. Autonomous Systems

deadlines.deadline_note: Visa-required applicants with a foreign bachelor's degree apply via uni-assist from 15 May to 15 July for the following summer semester; shown for summer semester 2027.
Visa-required applicants with a foreign bachelor's degree apply via uni-assist from 15 November to 15 February for the respective winter semester; shown for winter semester 2027.

requirements_summary: Bachelor or equivalent with sufficient computer science content, minimum German-scale grade of 2.5, CV, motivation letter, and recognized English proof at B2+ CEFR. No German certificate is required.
source_note: Official H-BRS admission page distinguishes visa-required applicants and routes them through uni-assist; catalog uses that India-relevant deadline track.

title: M.Sc. Computer Science

deadlines.deadline_note: Official late deadline for summer semester 2027. An early summer application deadline is 15 May.
Official late deadline for winter semester 2027/28. An early winter application deadline is 15 November of the preceding year.

requirements_summary: Bachelor or equivalent in computer science or a related field, strong academic record, English at C1, motivation statement, and two academic references. A medium-of-instruction letter is not accepted as English proof.
source_note: Applications use the Saarland Informatics Campus department portal. The official page lists early and late application rounds for both intakes.

title: M.Sc. Data Science and Artificial Intelligence

deadlines.deadline_note: Official late deadline for summer semester 2027. An early summer application deadline is 15 May.
Official late deadline for winter semester 2027/28. An early winter application deadline is 15 November of the preceding year.

requirements_summary: Bachelor in computer science or a related field with substantial mathematics, theoretical and practical computer science, machine learning, AI, and data-mining preparation; English at C1; motivation dossier and two references.
source_note: The official program page states no tuition fees and uses the department application portal with early and late rounds.

title: M.Sc. Data Science

deadlines.deadline_note: Non-EU applicants without EU residence use the pre-check and online application from 1 December to 1 March for winter intake.

requirements_summary: Relevant bachelor's degree with suitable data science, computer science, mathematics, and statistics preparation. International non-EU applicants complete TU Hamburg's pre-check before the online application.
source_note: The official page distinguishes the 1 March non-EU deadline from the 15 July EU/EU-resident deadline. The catalog shows the non-EU route.

title: B.Sc. Artificial Intelligence

deadlines.deadline_note: Published international deadline for winter semester 2026/27. The next cycle has not yet been published; verify before planning for 2027.

requirements_summary: Recognized university entrance qualification, English at B1 or higher, and successful qualification assessment. International applicants use FAU's Campo platform.
source_note: The official page currently publishes the 2026 international deadline only. FAU charges non-EU applicants a separate EUR 100 application fee from winter 2026/27.

title: M.Sc. Computer Science

deadlines.deadline_note: The official program page shows an extension to 15 July for winter semester 2026/27; the regular period ends 31 May.
Official regular application deadline for summer semester 2027.

requirements_summary: Relevant bachelor's degree meeting the subject-specific admission regulations and the required German language proof. Applications are submitted through the moin portal.
source_note: The program is taught in German, with four-semester full-time study and no admission restriction.

title: M.Sc. Applied Computer Science

deadlines.deadline_note: Usual deadline for international applicants outside the EU/EEA for summer semester 2027; confirm when the round opens.
Usual deadline for international applicants outside the EU/EEA for winter semester 2027/28; confirm when the round opens.

requirements_summary: Relevant bachelor's degree, required computer science and mathematics background, English proficiency, CV, and motivation letter. The faculty performs the admission review directly.
source_note: The official page gives separate non-EU/EEA deadlines. Future entries use its published recurring dates and are marked for confirmation when each round opens.

title: M.Sc. Computational and Data Science

deadlines.deadline_note: Official non-EU application deadline for summer semester 2027.
Official non-EU application deadline for winter semester 2027/28.

requirements_summary: Relevant 180-ECTS degree with defined mathematics and computer science preparation, German at DSH-2 or an accepted equivalent, and good English. Applications use Friedolin 2.0.
source_note: The official program and faculty pages provide separate non-EU deadlines and confirm no tuition fee.
